mapper.select: SELECT user_no, user_id, secu_pw, name_ko, name_en, phone, email, birth_date, addr_ko, addr_detail_ko, zip_code_ko, addr_en, addr_detail_en, zip_code_en, gender, user_tendency, created_dt, updated_dt, last_login_at FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_users.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO users ( user_no, user_id, secu_pw, name_ko, name_en, phone, email, birth_date, addr_ko, addr_detail_ko, zip_code_ko, addr_en, addr_detail_en, zip_code_en, gender, user_tendency, created_dt ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{userId}, #{secuPw}, #{nameKo}, #{nameEn}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{birthDate}, #{addrKo}, #{addrDetailKo}, #{zipCodeKo}, #{addrEn}, #{addrDetailEn}, #{zipCodeEn}, #{gender}, #{userTendency}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET last_login_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, updated_dt = SYSDATE WHERE user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_sensitive_infos ( sensitive_no, user_no, rrn_enc, rrn_masked, retention_until_dt ) VALUES ( seq_user_sensitive_infos.NEXTVAL, #{userNo}, #{rrnEnc}, #{rrnMasked}, SYSDATE + 3 )
mapper.select: SELECT sensitive_no, user_no, rrn_enc, rrn_masked, retention_until_dt FROM user_sensitive_infos WHERE user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_sensitive_infos WHERE retention_until_dt < SYSTIMESTAMP
